ddls:
CREATE TABLE "branches" (
  "branch_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each branch */,
  "branch_name" TEXT /* Name of the branch */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the branch is located */,
  "branch_address" TEXT /* Full address of the branch */,
  "branch_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the branch */,
  "branch_email" TEXT /* Contact email of the branch */,
  "branch_manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the branch manager (foreign key to users) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("branch_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "product_line_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product line */,
  "product_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product */,
  "product_image_url" TEXT /* URL to the product image */,
  "product_weight" REAL /* Weight of the product in grams */,
  "product_dimensions" TEXT /* Dimensions of the product (e.g., 10x20x30 cm) */,
  "product_supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_product_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_product_line_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_line_id") REFERENCES product_lines ("product_line_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the customer */,
  "customer_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer type */,
  "customer_email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "customer_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "customer_address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "customer_birthdate" TEXT /* Birthdate of the customer */,
  "customer_loyalty_points" INTEGER /* Loyalty points accumulated by the customer */,
  "customer_status" TEXT /* Status of the customer (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customers_customer_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_type_id") REFERENCES customer_types ("customer_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sale associated with the payment */,
  "payment_method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the payment method */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., pending, completed, failed) */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date of the payment */,
  "payment_time" TEXT /* Time of the payment */,
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* Unique transaction ID from the payment gateway */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_payment_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("payment_method_id") REFERENCES payment_methods ("payment_method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory entry */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Current quantity of the product in inventory */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Reorder level for the product */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update timestamp for the inventory */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sale associated with the rating */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer making the rating */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating given by the customer */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the customer review */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date of the rating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gross_margin" (
  "gross_margin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gross margin entry */,
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sale associated with the gross margin */,
  "gross_margin_percentage" REAL /* Gross margin percentage for the sale */,
  "gross_income" REAL /* Gross income for the sale */,
  "cost_price" REAL /* Cost price of the product */,
  "sale_price" REAL /* Sale price of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gross_margin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cogs" (
  "cogs_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each COGS entry */,
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sale associated with the COGS */,
  "cogs" REAL /* Cost of goods sold for the sale */,
  "total_cogs" REAL /* Total cost of goods sold for the sale */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cogs_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., sales analyst, customer service representative, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "last_login_time" TEXT /* Time of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the sales data */,
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sale being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of the access */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time of the access */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user making the access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_lines" (
  "product_line_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product line */,
  "product_line_name" TEXT /* Name of the product line */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_line_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_types" (
  "customer_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer type */,
  "customer_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_methods" (
  "payment_method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment method */,
  "payment_method_name" TEXT /* Name of the payment method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "supplier_address" TEXT /* Address of the supplier */,
  "supplier_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the supplier */,
  "supplier_email" TEXT /* Email address of the supplier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "employee_name" TEXT /* Name of the employee */,
  "employee_role" TEXT /* Role of the employee */,
  "employee_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the employee */,
  "employee_email" TEXT /* Email address of the employee */,
  "employee_hire_date" TEXT /* Date of hire */,
  "employee_status" TEXT /* Status of the employee (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-role relationship */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
